reason_for_call: Triage a message and draft a follow-up

task_params.subject: community partnerships
followup_points: thank them for the earlier exchange
suggest a short call next week
ask what timing works on their side

attributes.subject: Re: Community partnerships for neighborhood wellness outreach
attributes.body: Hi Maya, I appreciated your note about local collaboration opportunities. I think there could be a strong fit between your coalition's outreach work and our patient engagement goals, especially if we explore a small art-therapy element as part of a broader community wellness effort. Happy to compare ideas once schedules calm down.

attributes.subject: Community partnerships and fall programming ideas
attributes.body: Hi Maya, circling back on community partnerships as we think about fall programming. I would still love to explore whether a joint pilot around creative wellness or art-therapy-informed patient engagement could make sense. If your team is open, I can put together a concise concept outline and we can find time to discuss.

attributes.subject: Q3 staffing dashboard revisions
attributes.body: I've attached the revised dashboard with the throughput and staffing updates incorporated. Let me know if you want me to break out the ambulatory figures separately before leadership review.

attributes.subject: Re: Community partnerships and fall programming ideas
attributes.body: Thanks, Gabriel. I agree there may be room for a joint effort here. Things are a little packed on our end this week, but I would be glad to reconnect soon.
